## Meeting Purpose

[Review and align on GrowthX GEO Research Study Design for analyzing AI-powered search citations](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed on overall study design approach: analyzing prompts across industries, funnel stages, and prompt categories](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Need to further investigate counterfactual setup and reverse engineer citation sources](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Will start with a pilot using one industry (likely FinTech) to test pipeline and learn before full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on defining prompt categories, funnel stages, and other study parameters](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

## Topics

### Study Design and Methodology

  - [Using 40 prompts per industry/funnel stage combination (240 total) as minimum, multiplied by 14 days](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Will use search API calls to force web searches, not regular LLM calls](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Need to create features for prompts (e.g., question type, length) in addition to content features](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Counterfactual setup requires more investigation (Google top 20, known competitors, regular background searches)](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### API and Search Behavior

  - [Different AI platforms (Claude, ChatGPT) use various search providers (Brave, Bing)](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Search process: detect intent, generate query, return results, re-rank semantically, select top results](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Need to investigate differences between manual searches, regular API calls, and forced search API calls](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

### Next Steps and Task Division

  - [Jason: Handle funnel stages and prompt categories](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2411.0)
  - [Katja: Focus on industries, platforms, and creating the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
  - [Daniel: Oversee plans and cost considerations](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
  - [Team: Collaborate on defining prompt variations and study parameters](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Consider setting up regular sync meetings for updates and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2594.0)

### Open Questions and Investigations

  - [How to effectively set up counterfactuals and reverse engineer citation sources](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Investigate if all citations come from first few search result pages](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Compare manual app usage vs API calls for potential differences](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [Explore how different prompt types might trigger web searches](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share study design document with Jose for initial review](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2238.0)
  - [Investigate and define counterfactual setup methodology](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Begin defining prompt categories and funnel stages](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Set up a small-scale pilot test with one industry (likely FinTech)](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Create a shared document for ongoing research notes and findings](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2556.0)
  - [Schedule regular sync meetings for team alignment and progress updates](https://fathom.video/share/enbhWBaLmPrz7vtzGzJxZru_DcEYdnSw?tab=summary&timestamp=2594.0)
